name: Airakeet
description: Airakeet is an open-source, local-first macOS dictation app for Apple Silicon. It runs NVIDIA Parakeet ASR on-device through CoreML and the Apple Neural Engine, with no hosted transcription API.

skills.name: Airakeet product discovery
skills.description: Provides static product identity, source, release, privacy, and roadmap information for Airakeet. This site does not expose a callable A2A endpoint.
examples: Learn whether Airakeet sends audio to the cloud
